name: Desmodus Versio
description: Stereo-in, stereo-out synthetic tail-generator reverb and DSP platform. Sparse-FDN reverberator with LFO modulation, shimmer, and sidechain-style ducking. Firmware-updateable via USB.

controls.name: Blend
controls.description: Dry/wet balance. Full left=dry only, full right=wet only, center=equal mix.

controls.name: Tone
controls.description: Bipolar filter in reverb tank. Left=lowpass, right=highpass, center=disabled.

controls.name: Regen
controls.description: Feedback in reverb tank. Controls reverb length, infinite tails past noon, and input ducking past 3 o'clock.
controls.detail: Full CCW=min · ~11 o'clock=shorter reverbs · past noon=infinite tail · past 3 o'clock=ducking

controls.name: Speed
controls.description: Rate of the internal LFO that modulates delay lines (amount set by Index).

controls.name: Index
controls.description: Bipolar LFO amount sent to delay lines. Center=disabled. Left=random LFO. Right=sine LFO.

controls.name: Size
controls.description: Delay time of the reverb. Shorter values = smaller spaces.

controls.name: Dense
controls.description: Spacing of delay lines. Full left=delay-like, full right=smeared reverb.

controls.name: FSU Button
controls.description: Maxes out Regen and mutes input while pressed, creating a wall of infinite reverb.
controls.detail: Momentary · also responds to gate input >+2V

controls.name: LIM/DST/SHM Switch
controls.description: Reverb style: LIM=clean limiting, DST=saturation distortion, SHM=shimmer with octave-up pitch shift feedback.

controls.name: BND/LRP/JMP Switch
controls.description: Controls how delay lines respond when modulated. BND=crossfade, LRP=interpolate (pitch shift), JMP=instant change.

inputs.name: In L
inputs.description: Left audio input. Normalled to right input when R is unpatched (mono in).

inputs.name: In R
inputs.description: Right audio input. If unpatched, L signal is normalled to both inputs.

inputs.name: FSU Gate
inputs.description: Gate input. High gate maxes Regen and mutes input, same as FSU button.

inputs.name: Blend CV
inputs.description: CV input for Blend parameter. Sums with pot position.

inputs.name: Tone CV
inputs.description: CV input for Tone parameter. Sums with pot position.

inputs.name: Regen CV
inputs.description: CV input for Regen parameter. Sums with pot position.

inputs.name: Size CV
inputs.description: CV input for Size parameter. Sums with pot position.

inputs.name: Speed CV
inputs.description: CV input for Speed parameter. Sums with pot position.

inputs.name: Index CV
inputs.description: CV input for Index parameter. Sums with pot position.

inputs.name: Dense CV
inputs.description: CV input for Dense parameter. Sums with pot position.

behaviors.name: Shimmer
behaviors.description: Adds a one-octave pitch shift that feeds back into the reverb input, creating ethereal shimmering reverb tails.

behaviors.name: Infinite Tail / Ducking
behaviors.description: Past noon the reverb reaches 100% feedback for infinite tail. Past 3 o'clock, new input sounds duck the infinite reverb creating sidechain-style effects.

behaviors.name: Self-Oscillation
behaviors.description: With input unpatched and Regen past noon, DV self-oscillates. Manipulate Size, Dense, Tone, and Style to shape the generated tones.

behaviors.name: Simple Delay
behaviors.description: With Dense fully CCW, the effect sounds like a delay rather than reverb. Regen sets feedback time.

behaviors.name: FSU (Freeze)
behaviors.description: Maxes feedback to 100% and mutes input. Current reverb buffer loops indefinitely. SHM mode causes frozen pad to rise in pitch over time.

behaviors.name: Self-Sustaining Drone
behaviors.description: FSU injects white noise burst into reverb tank with infinite feedback. Becomes a self-sustaining drone voice. Shape with Tone, Size, Dense.

patchIdeas.name: Shimmer pad
patchIdeas.patch: Mode: SHM · BND switch · Size 1-2 o'clock · Regen just past noon · Tone slightly CW · polyphonic source

patchIdeas.name: Rhythmic ducking reverb
patchIdeas.patch: Regen past 3 o'clock · rhythmic input · input transients duck the infinite tail · natural sidechain compression

patchIdeas.name: Metallic IDM texture
patchIdeas.patch: BND: JMP · stepped random CV → Size CV · each step hard-jumps delay time · metallic pitch artifacts

patchIdeas.name: Reverb bloom
patchIdeas.patch: Slow envelope → Blend CV · signal fades from dry into full reverb over time · then snaps back

patchIdeas.name: Frozen pad sculpting
patchIdeas.patch: FSU to freeze · sweep Tone and Dense while frozen · reshape timbre of frozen sound in real time
